rows.label: tev012401_SEL3021
rows.name: Ask Piers about recent developments.

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0001
rows.name:
Heya! I heard you're on data-probe
duty for your first mission. Be
careful out there, all right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0002
rows.name:
Hey, wait a minute. What
are you even doing here?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0003
rows.name:
You're installing that data probe to the east,
right? Well, this is NLA's west gate. You can look
at the map on your comm device if you're confused.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0004
rows.name:
The arrow indicates your destination,
all right? Make sure you take a look
at it before you set off anywhere.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0005
rows.name:
A BLADE from the Arms Union
just passed through here on
the way to Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0006
rows.name:
The Doll that BLADE was piloting was
incredible. I'd kill for one like that![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0007
rows.name:
Of course, I don't even have a Doll license,
so I'll never get to ride anything so
cool. Some BLADEs have all the luck![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0008
rows.name:
It's not just this gate—I hear the
east gate has been opened as well.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0009
rows.name:
...Huh? Where is it? Oh, just head towards BLADE HQ and
then keep going toward the BLADE Home. It's just down the
road to the left of the BLADE Home. You can't miss it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0010
rows.name:
Anyway, feel free to use whichever gate
is more convenient for the task at hand.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0011
rows.name:
Hmm? You still don't know which
one that is? In that case, just
take a look at your map.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0012
rows.name:
And if you get lost outside, check your map for
that, too. Sure beats standing there sucking your
thumb and hoping your mom will come pick you up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0013
rows.name:
An awful lot of time has passed since that
Arms passed through here on the way to
Nightglow Forest. I hope everything's okay.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0014
rows.name:
I know I'm probably worrying about it too
much, considering the incredible Doll that
BLADE was piloting and all, but still...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0015
rows.name:
Anyway, if your business takes
you up to Nightglow Forest, could
you maybe keep an eye out?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0016
rows.name:
Did you know that you can reach the
coast by traveling north from here?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0017
rows.name:
If you're exploring that area, be
careful not to fall into the ocean.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0018
rows.name:
The only way I know of to get back up onto the
cliffs is via the sloping path at Northpointe
Cove, but it's a real pain in the tokus.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0019
rows.name:
There are also lots of vicious indigens hanging around
there. If they start to get threatening, it's probably
better to sheathe your weapon and run for it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0020
rows.name:
If you travel a short ways west from
here, you'll reach Biahno Lake.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0021
rows.name:
Word is, they're planning to build
a water-purification plant there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0022
rows.name:
But unfortunately, the people bringing
materials to the construction site are
constantly being attacked by indigens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0023
rows.name:
The project leaders are over at the water-purification
plant in the residential district. Maybe you
should go see if you can help them out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0024
rows.name:
I closed the west gate as
soon as the siren sounded.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0025
rows.name:
But there was nothing we could do
about the enemy mechs that could fly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0026
rows.name:
Some of the larger indigens are also capable
of flight. Maybe we should start thinking
about a dome or a force field or something.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0027
rows.name:
I know how important the search for the Lifepoint
is, but I'd like to see a little more effort
put into improving humanity's new home.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0028
rows.name:
Folks were so shorthanded the other day,
they even asked ME to participate in a
mission. And man, was it ever awkward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0029
rows.name:
The whole team was distant and
mumbly at first, though we bonded
a bit as the mission went on.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0030
rows.name:
I typically don't talk much, but
I ended up telling them about my
various hobbies and interests.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0032
rows.name:
Thanks to the great work you and Elma
did, the Growth's boss has been toppled.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0033
rows.name:
But that hardly means the indigens of Mira
are going to show up at our door with
friendship treaties between their teeth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0034
rows.name:
It seems that no matter how
strong we become, there will
always be enemies at our gates.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0035
rows.name:
I don't know if we'll have to eliminate all the potential
threats to humanity like we did on Earth, or if we can
find a way to live in harmony with the indigens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0036
rows.name: It's a lot to think about, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0037
rows.name:
They say a single Growth supersoldier wiped out
an entire elite team of Avalanche that had been
sent to the high ground near Bedrock Hold.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0038
rows.name:
Apparently that supersoldier is called
Nahum the Red Hare, and she's feared
even by the rest of the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0039
rows.name:
But if you were able to bring down
Luxaar, I'm sure you can do something
about this Nahum woman.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0040
rows.name:
The other day, a Zaruboggan named
Hoskeran picked up all the trash
around here and carried it away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0041
rows.name:
I thought that was pretty
strange, but he said he really
enjoyed being on garbage duty.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0042
rows.name:
In fact, I think he said he loved picking
up trash, but hated some other duty that
had recently been assigned to him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0043
rows.name:
Man, what could be worse than collecting
garbage? I mean, it's GARBAGE.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0044
rows.name:
They tossed Homer into the detention
facility. Case closed, I guess.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0045
rows.name:
I'm just glad the Zaruboggan
were cleared of any wrongdoing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0046
rows.name:
They look and act weird, and it makes them seem
much more suspicious than those Ma-non. But there
isn't really anything we can do about that.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0047
rows.name:
Still, I'm doing what I can. I tell
everyone who passes through here
what a great guy Hoskeran is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0048
rows.name:
After all, it's a Companion's duty to
try and make this city a better place.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0049
rows.name:
That Nastasha woman was so excited
to have been rescued by Elma.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0050
rows.name:
She even asked if I'd tell her whenever Elma passes
through here and report what Elma was wearing.
She's like some kind of weird Elma groupie...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_MSG0051
rows.name:
...Hey, relax! I'm not going to
actually DO it. You can pass through
here with your mind at ease.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev012401_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Piers about the gate.
